messages.body: Finish task 2 now: ensure your branch is committed, include delegation evidence and verification evidence, transition task 2 to completed, set status idle, and report final summary to leader.

Finalize task 2 now: continue your verification/reporting to completion, transition task 2 to completed, and include the required delegation evidence plus verification evidence in the result. No live orders or Gist upload.

Nudge: please finish task 2 now, include delegation evidence + verification evidence, transition task 2 to completed, set worker status idle, and keep any auto-checkpoint commits eligible for final Lore-format rewrite before finalization.
